overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a rainy night in a Cyberpunk 2077 nomad camp. The player character moves from a campfire gathering through makeshift camp structures, enters a medical facility, and explores the dark exterior environment with neon-lit city towers visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: campfire gathering circle in nomad camp

agents.ego_description: circling around the campfire observing the gathered group and the surrounding camp

notable_agents.action: sitting on a red plastic chair by the fire pit
standing guard near the fire with arms crossed

entered.detail: large burning fire pit with rocks arranged around the perimeter
bright red plastic chairs arranged in a circle around the fire
tall futuristic towers with colorful neon lighting visible in the rainy distance
red metal barrels and containers near the seating area

segments.scene_description: The scene opens around a blazing campfire in a rainy nomad camp, with characters gathered on red plastic chairs. The camera circles the fire, revealing the industrial makeshift structures of the camp and distant neon-lit towers against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: outer camp area with elevated wooden structures

events.description: moves away from the campfire into the darker exterior camp area
enters deeper shadow away from the firelight, visibility decreases

agents.ego_description: walking away from the campfire toward a wooden structure in the darker camp exterior

entered.detail: elevated wooden structure with stairs leading up to a platform
abandoned vehicle with dim lights visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Leaving the warmth of the fire, the camera moves through dark and rainy camp exterior. An elevated wooden shack appears on the right while the glow of the campfire fades behind. The environment becomes darker and more enclosed.

scene_state.functional_zone: medical bay with surgical equipment and monitors

events.description: enters the medical facility from the rainy exterior
interior green fluorescent lighting illuminates the metal corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the medical facility examining the equipment and characters inside

notable_agents.action: standing in the corridor holding a tray
sitting near the medical equipment against the wall

entered.detail: futuristic surgical bed with mechanical arms and equipment
glowing monitors and control panels with red and blue lights
narrow metal walkway with hazard stripes on the floor

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dimly lit medical facility with green artificial lighting. Inside, there are advanced medical beds, computer consoles, and characters standing in the narrow metal corridor. The sound of rain fades as the door closes behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: open camp area with scattered shanty structures

events.description: exits the medical facility back into the rainy exterior camp
approaches a lit area with wooden picnic tables

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark camp exterior past makeshift buildings and vehicles

entered.detail: wooden picnic tables with red plastic chairs arranged around them
tall palm trees silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: Exiting the medical facility, the camera returns to the rainy exterior and the open camp area. Wooden picnic tables with red chairs appear on the right, and the distant neon towers are visible again against the dark sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway between metal camp structures

events.description: enters narrow covered passage between green metal walls
passes close to a character in the narrow corridor

agents.ego_description: moving through a narrow corridor between camp structures

notable_agents.action: walking ahead in the narrow passage wearing an orange jacket and helmet

entered.detail: green painted corrugated metal sheet walls forming a narrow corridor
fluorescent tube lights illuminating the covered walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow covered passage with green metal walls on both sides. Overhead fluorescent lights illuminate the corridor as the camera follows a character in an orange jacket walking ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: central camp area with holographic signage

events.description: exits narrow passage into open camp area with large holographic sign
returns to area with visible campfire glow in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking through the main camp area toward the gathering space with the holographic billboard

notable_agents.action: sitting at a table near a tent entrance

entered.detail: large glowing green holographic billboard displaying graphics and text
green canvas tent structures with open flaps
distant orange glow from the main campfire visible through the rain

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow passage, the camera enters the main camp area featuring a large green holographic sign. Camping tents line the left side while characters sit at tables. The distant glow of the original campfire is visible again, and the neon towers now appear on the left horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy nomad camp, transitioning from the warmth of a communal fire into sterile interiors before returning to the neon-lit exterior. It begins by circling a blazing campfire where characters gather on red plastic chairs, with the glow of the fire contrasting against distant neon towers and industrial makeshift structures. As the camera leaves the warmth, the scene shifts into a darker, enclosed exterior past an elevated wooden shack before entering a dimly lit medical facility characterized by green artificial lighting and narrow metal corridors. Upon exiting back into the rain, the camera passes wooden picnic tables and enters a narrow covered passage with green metal walls, following a character in an orange jacket under fluorescent lights. Finally, the camera emerges from the passage into the main camp area, passing camping tents and a large green holographic sign as the original campfire and distant city towers reappear on the horizon.
